summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: chip and AI startups dominated March, with Nexthop AI, MatX, and Ayar Labs each closing $400M-plus rounds in Santa Clara, Mountain View, and San Jose. Frore Systems (thermal tech), Mind Robotics, and Rhoda AI also banked serious capital, signaling investor confidence in hardware and applied AI. Meanwhile, most local tech firms are hiring steadily—only two are trimming staff.
